critic_justifications.NY Times: Ben Brantley praised the visual spectacle and emotional core while noting some narrative simplicity.
critic_justifications.Variety: Critic highlighted the dazzling production design, energetic performances, and successful adaptation of the film's aesthetic.
critic_justifications.Hollywood Reporter: Review emphasized the stunning choreography and immersive design, with strong appreciation for the cast's commitment.
critic_justifications.NY Post: Positive reception of the theatrical ambition and entertainment value, though with minor reservations about pacing.
critic_justifications.The Guardian: Acknowledged the visual splendor and crowd-pleasing appeal while noting the narrative could be more substantial.
critic_justifications.Time Out NY: Praised the acrobatic spectacle, costume design, and the infectious energy of the production.
critic_justifications.TheaterMania: Review highlighted the successful translation of Luhrmann's cinematic vision to the stage with strong technical execution.
critic_justifications.Vulture: Critic appreciated the boldness and visual imagination while noting some structural predictability.
critic_justifications.Associated Press: Positive assessment of the production's ambition, design, and ability to captivate audiences.
critic_justifications.BroadwayWorld: Review praised the spectacular staging and performances, with recognition of its crowd-pleasing appeal.

audience_justifications.Show-Score: Audience consensus has been strongly positive with A-range ratings reflecting enthusiasm for the spectacle and entertainment value.
audience_justifications.Broadway Scorecard: Community ratings show high approval with audiences consistently rating it as a must-see theatrical experience.
audience_justifications.Broadway.com: Audience reviews reflect strong satisfaction with the visual production and emotional engagement with the story.
